top.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
top.summary: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

top.title: His father had just been buried. Then West Bank settlers forced him to dig up the body
top.summary: The UN human rights office condemns incident as "'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians" in the West Bank.

top.title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
top.summary: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.

top.title: Cyber-crime increasingly coming with threats of physical violence
top.summary: While hackers used to sneak into computer systems, intimidation of staff is now more common.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

top.title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
top.summary: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

title.#text: The Bastl Kalimba is a wild synth that thinks it’s a thumb piano
Ashnymph’s Childhood EP is exhilarating dance goth rock
Cricut’s $99 craft cutting machine helped me feel creative again
